submit.description: Are you sure you want to submit this timesheet?
submit.notice: Warning! Once submitted, timesheet will be presented to company and will be no longer available for editing. You can go back and save it as a draft to submit it later.
submit.title: Confirm Timesheet Submission

warnings.blocked: This timesheet is overdue and will need to be reviewed by your recruiter and processed manually.
warnings.hasBreak: You cannot log hours for days you're on break. If you need to update your break days, please reach out to your recruiter.
warnings.overdue: Talent has {{days}} to submit this timesheet for automatic processing. After that this timesheet will need to be reviewed by a recruiter.
warnings.submitted: You're updating submitted timesheet which will result in related Billing Cycle. All related invoices, payments, and commissions will be sent to the accounting team for review and updated accordingly.

TimesheetList.empty: There are no {{type}} timesheets for this position right now

TimesheetSummary.reasonHasBreak: Minimum commitment not applied due to time off during the billing cycle.
TimesheetSummary.reasonIsTrial: Minimum commitment not applied due to trial during the billing cycle.
TimesheetSummary.reasonNotFullLength: Minimum commitment not applied due to short billing cycle.

UnsubmitTimesheet.title: Unsubmit timesheet
UnsubmitTimesheet.warning: When you remove this timesheet, all related invoices, payments, and commissions will be sent to the Finance team for review and updated accordingly upon timesheet re-submission.
UnsubmitTimesheet.warningExtraHours: When you remove this timesheet, all related invoices, payments, and commissions will be sent to the Finance team for review and updated accordingly.
